retry_reason: refcount_set is unconditional and never fails; allocation failure is separate and may be retried if conditions change, but the refcount operation itself does not fail.
contract_summary: Creation (set) wrapper: allocates a new afs_vlserver_list object, initializes its refcount to 1 (establishing the initial reference), and initializes the embedded lock. Returns the object with one reference owned by the caller. The caller must eventually call the corresponding put function (e.g., afs_put_vlserverlist) to release the reference when the object is no longer needed. On allocation failure, returns NULL; the caller should check for this. There are no additional locking or RCU obligations beyond the internal lock initialization.
